post.description:
Onboard a user (create username + password).
Password is hashed (argon2) and stored in DB. The user is created with
is_email_verified=False and a 6-digit OTP is emailed. Call /verify-otp
to activate the account and receive a JWT.

Start a password-reset flow. Always returns the same success response
regardless of whether the user exists, to prevent email enumeration.

Verify the password-reset OTP. On success returns a short-lived reset_token
that must be supplied to /reset-password along with the new password.

get.description: "Get token" endpoint: validate the bearer token and return its claims.
Flatten API scan findings so frontend can render them in Vulnerability section.

schema.title: Response List Api Findings Vulnerabilities Api Findings Get

get.description:
Unified Vulnerability feed:
- API scan findings (from MinIO/DB report)
- Subdomain scan findings (from `vulnerabilities` table)

schema.title: Response List All Findings Vulnerabilities Findings Get

get.description: Generate and download an ASM PDF report (multi-page) similar to the provided sample layout.
Get the current status and progress of an API scan.

post.description:
Run the API APT scanner against provided endpoints.
If Celery + Redis are available, the scan runs in a background worker (returns 202).
Otherwise, falls back to synchronous execution.

get.description: List all API keys for the current user (never exposes the full key).

schema.title: Response List Api Keys Settings Api Keys Get

post.description: Generate a new API key. The full key is returned only in this response.

Receive a CI/CD scan report and persist it.

Creates:
- A ``Scan`` row (status=Completed, type=ci_api / ci_subdomain)
- An ``ApiScanReport`` row with the full JSON
- ``Vulnerability`` rows for each finding (linked to domain if found)

get.description: List CI/CD scans (API key auth — for CLI/CI usage).
List CI/CD scans (JWT auth — for the frontend dashboard).
List IP addresses with their associated domain_name.

post.description: Create an IP address entry connected to a domain.

get.description:
List URLs with their associated domain_name.
If the `urls` table hasn't been created yet, returns an empty list.

post.description:
Create a URL entry connected to a domain.
If the `urls` table hasn't been created yet, returns 400 with guidance.
Webhook endpoint called by MinIO whenever an object is uploaded.

get.description:
Get all subdomains with their associated domain information.
Returns: name, tags, domain_name, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at

asset_url.title: Asset Url
asset_url.description: Base URL of the target API, e.g. https://api.example.com

openapi_spec.title: Openapi Spec
openapi_spec.description: OpenAPI 3.x / Swagger 2.0 spec (JSON dict or YAML string)

secondary_auth_config.description: Secondary auth for privilege escalation testing

type.title: Type
type.description: Auth type: bearer | api_key | api_key_query | basic | none

header_name.title: Header Name
header_name.description: Header name for API key auth

param_name.title: Param Name
param_name.description: Query param name for API key auth

report_type.title: Report Type
report_type.description: EXEC_SUMMARY|DETAILS_SUMMARY (EXPOSURE_STORIES/ASM are accepted as legacy aliases)

scan_id.title: Scan Id
scan_id.description: Required for API_TESTING reports (scan_id of an API scan)
